body.summary: Nothing was changed this session. The only thing that showed up in git was the Claude Code config folder, which was already there. Fresh start, no work done yet.

stages.note: Session view loaded in mobile viewport
Voice tab active. state='Ready. Tap the big button, speak, tap again to send.' main_btn_disabled=False
Dropped network mid-recording after 14 chunks; UI held the audio (state: 'Uploading...') instead of failing.
After reconnect the held chunks resumed: 55 chunks uploaded total (was 14 before the drop) and the utterance transcribed without re-recording.
Session view loaded in mobile viewport
Voice tab active. state='Ready. Tap the big button, speak, tap again to send.' main_btn_disabled=False
Sent a ~3 minute command via the composer to force a long turn.
Progress note generated and shown during the long turn: 'Still waiting on the agent - it appears to be actively thinking through a problem, working through its reasoning before taking its next step.'

stages.reply: Agent finished but produced no visible output.

body.displayText:
Please use the Bash tool to run a slow benchmarkforme,andwaitforittofinishbeforeyoureply.Runitinthe
  foreground (not in the background) and set the command timeout to 300 seconds. The command: a loop that prints a      step number then sleeps 5 seconds, repeated 35 times, which takesabitunderthreeminutes.Replyonlyonceithascompleted.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ⏵⏵ bypass permissions on (shift+tab to cycle)
❯ Please use the Bash tool to run a slow benchmark for me, and wait for it to finish before you reply. Run it in the      foreground (not in the background) and set the command timeout to 300 seconds. The command: a loop that prints a step    number then sleeps 5 seconds, repeated 35 times, which takes a bit under three minutes. Reply only once it has         completed.
